name: agentropolis-asimov-robotics-mcp
description: Robotics MCP tool manifest for Asimov District. Agents request robot actions through policy gates, not direct control.

registry.name: robot.get
registry.description: Get one robot body profile by body_id.

registry.name: robot.register
registry.description: Register a robot body in the Asimov District body registry. Requires operator approval.

registry.name: robot.update_status
registry.description: Update robot status, inspection state, or deployment state.

capabilities.name: capability.list
capabilities.description: List capabilities for a robot body.

capabilities.name: capability.request
capabilities.description: Request use of a robot capability through policy and safety gates.

safety.name: safety.preflight
safety.description: Run preflight checks before a task.

safety.name: safety.estop
safety.description: Trigger emergency stop. Must be available to operators at all times.

safety.name: safety.audit_status
safety.description: Read safety, inspection, and audit state.

simulation.name: sim.run_task
simulation.description: Run a robot task in simulation before physical deployment.

simulation.name: sim.validate_task
simulation.description: Validate task output against safety criteria.

deployment.name: deployment.request
deployment.description: Request a real-world robot deployment. Requires policy evaluation.

deployment.name: deployment.approve
deployment.description: Human approval for a deployment request.

deployment.name: deployment.deny
deployment.description: Deny a deployment request with reason.

deployment.name: deployment.log_event
deployment.description: Append a deployment event to audit log.

maintenance.name: maintenance.log
maintenance.description: Log maintenance, repair, or calibration event.

maintenance.name: maintenance.parts_needed
maintenance.description: List parts needed for repair or build completion.

resources.name: resources.open_source.list
resources.description: List open-source robotics resources and adapter candidates.

resources.name: resources.open_source.check_license
resources.description: Check license compatibility before adding a resource.
